name: chaintools
description: Exposes a curated set of EVM read/write tools to the agent over MCP. Wraps a remote MCP gateway plus a small local helper for offline RPC calls.
author: chaintools-mcp

intent.description: Natural-language description of what the user wants to do on chain

chainId.description: Optional override for which chain to act on

result.description: Tool invocation result returned by the resolved MCP tool
